rows.label: qev031103_MSG0001
rows.name:
Goodness gracious. I took the liberty
of eating the trees around here, and
the Earthlings got angry at me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0002
rows.name:
Honestly... If they are not meant to be
ingested, then for what purpose are trees
planted in a place like this...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev031103_SEL0011
rows.name: Teach him that they are for viewing.

rows.label: qev031103_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev031103_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask if he knows anyone
knowledgeable about plants.

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0003
rows.name:
Viewing? What an incredibly
mysterious interpretation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0004
rows.name:
Not ingesting them, nor utilizing them...
Something that exists purely to be looked
at seems endlessly wasteful to me, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0005
rows.name:
There is no Orphean who possesses knowledge
surpassing the botanist Monboiton.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0006
rows.name:
As for his whereabouts... Please wait
a moment. I will track his Ovah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hmm... He seems to be
aboard the Ma-non ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0008
rows.name:
Everywhere you look, it's
nothing but viewing trees...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0009
rows.name:
I truly wish they would plant at
least a few trees inside NLA that
Orpheans could eat freely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0010
rows.name:
I wish to ingest a tree... But there
are no suitable ones available.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0011
rows.name:
The Earthlings told me I must
not eat the ones planted for
viewing, so whatever shall I do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_JNK0030
rows.name: Suggestion

rows.label: qev031103_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell him he should go outside NLA.

rows.label: qev031103_JNK0040
rows.name: Warning

rows.label: qev031103_SEL0041
rows.name:
Tell him Monboiton ate a tree without
permission and suffered a terrible fate.

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0012
rows.name:
If I were to be attacked by native
creatures outside, someone like
me would die immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0013
rows.name:
Since I ingest plants for the
purpose of life support, risking
my life to do so is not rational.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0014
rows.name:
...That is quite terrible. I shall
be careful around Bias women.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031103_MSG0015
rows.name:
Since I ingest plants for the
purpose of life support, risking
my life to do so is not rational.[ST:wait ]
